title: AI Discovery
description: How AI systems find, interpret, and cite content ... and what that means for how you build and structure your site.
intro: Search engines used to rank pages. AI systems now interpret them. That is a different problem. Being indexed is no longer the goal ... being understood, trusted, and cited is. This section covers how AI discovery actually works and what structural decisions make a site more likely to be surfaced by AI-assisted search.

seo.title: AI Discovery ... Visibility and Search ... AI Now Guide
seo.description: How AI systems interpret and cite content ... and what it means for how you structure your site.
